settings.heading: Troubleshoot the clearest symptom first
settings.copy: Start with the symptom you see, take the shortest recovery step, and escalate only if the issue remains.
settings.support_note: This page should narrow the issue quickly, then point to one next step instead of sending you in circles.

settings.heading: Troubleshooting by symptom and product behavior
settings.copy: Review the likely cause, try the clearest next action, and move forward only if the symptom still remains.

settings.heading: Move to the next clear path
settings.copy: If the symptom points to a file, a guide, or direct help, take the next step without restarting the journey.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Open drivers and utilities when the issue points to software or tools.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Open the setup guide when the symptom points to the install path or a missed step.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Start a support request when guided troubleshooting still leaves one clear question open.

settings.heading: Still stuck after the guided step?
settings.copy: Start one support request and include the product, symptom, and what you already tried.
